disp_width.description: Hidden width for the displacement net with 2 hidden layers.

stress_width.description: Hidden width for the stress net with 2 hidden layers.

lr_gamma.description: StepLR multiplicative decay factor when scheduler='step'.

lr_step_size.description: StepLR step size for proxy runs when scheduler='step'.

w_bc.description: Weight on the total boundary-condition loss.

w_cons_bc.description: Weight on the constitutive boundary-consistency loss.
